validation_command: bash -lc \grep -q 'Multi-Engine Fleet Metric Parity and Overview Convergence' EPIC_ROADMAP.md && test -f .codex-tasks/20260421-fleet-metric-parity-epic/EPIC.md && test -f .codex-tasks/20260421-fleet-metric-parity-epic/SUBTASKS.csv && test -f .codex-tasks/20260421-fleet-metric-parity-epic/PROGRESS.md\""

task: Freeze fleet metric parity contract baseline
acceptance_criteria: Current MySQL-only overview seams are explicit and the approved parity boundary is frozen before API implementation begins
notes: Closed by freezing the Oracle fleet metric family, switching overview instances to generic `metrics[]`, and explicitly approving engine-specific leader semantics before implementation

task: Implement engine-aware overview aggregation and analytics API parity

notes: Closed by making overview cards/charts and coverage engine-aware for MySQL+Oracle, updating the overview instance contract to `metrics[]`, and syncing OpenAPI plus the typed client

task: Implement web overview parity surface and fleet messaging
acceptance_criteria: Overview page, dashboard model, and capability messaging reflect the supported parity surface instead of baseline-only wording
validation_command: pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck
notes: Closed by aligning dashboard capability messaging, preview fixtures, and overview/instances copy with the new mixed-engine parity contract

completed_at: Capacity insights, signal leaders, and overview presets expose honest mixed-engine parity semantics without overclaiming equivalence
retry_count: pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web build
column13: Closed by moving diagnostics and leaders to engine-specific semantics and by replacing remote Google font fetches with local Fontsource assets so web build stays deterministic

task: Run fleet metric parity signoff gates
acceptance_criteria: Repo-root parity signoff passes with backend, web, smoke, and Oracle live coverage evidence
validation_command: pnpm openapi:check && uv run pytest tests/api/analytics tests/integration/analytics_queries tests/integration/metrics_pipeline && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm smoke && pnpm test:control-plane:oracle
